```mjs title=async.mjs
import { readFile } from "fs";

// fs?3cf4

// ./async.js

const asyncValue = 'async'

export { readFile };

```

```mjs title=main.mjs
import { readFile as external_fs_readFile } from "fs";

// fs?771d

// ./index.js




it('should handle external used in both entry and dynamic import', async () => {
	const mod = await import("./async.mjs")
	expect(mod.readFile).toBeDefined()
	expect(external_fs_readFile).toBeDefined()
	expect(mod.readFile).toBe(external_fs_readFile)
})

export { external_fs_readFile as readFile };

```
